More utilities coming in future updates.
Override the surplus-power setting on ev: Override the surplus-power setting on every applicable building when placing a blueprint or pasting a copy. 'Default' leaves each building's saved setting alone.
Keep each building's saved surplus setti: Keep each building's saved surplus setting from the blueprint.
Force every applicable building to consu: Force every applicable building to consume only when there is surplus power.
Force every applicable building to consume power normally (not surplus-only).
Toggle levels to show or hide belts and: Toggle levels to show or hide belts and pipes at each height.
Hotkeys: PageUp shows one more level, Pa: Hotkeys: PageUp shows one more level, PageDown hides one more level.
Note: If you hide levels while placing b: Note: If you hide levels while placing belts or pipes, connection arrows from hidden levels will still show. Exit and re-enter build mode to refresh.
Select a vehicle type and drag to select: Select a vehicle type and drag to select vehicles on the map, then click a destination to move them.
